summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: ValueTracker s_tr morphs triangle ABC through 4 configs. always_redraw rebuilds YELLOW triangle + extended GREY side-lines + GREEN incircle (center (aA+bB+cC)/Σ, radius area/s) + 3 excircles BLUE/RED/ORANGE with excenter formulas using signed-length combinations. Live a, b, c, area, r=area/s.
